style_name: Acid Lime 3D Streetwear Type Poster Style
style_summary: A glossy C4D streetwear campaign poster system built from pale studio space, oversized black block typography, acid-lime marker strokes, sticker badges, fashion-tool props, low wide-angle character staging, and clean synthetic product lighting.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main stylized 3D character, mascot, object, or group
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, tool, gadget, fashion prop, or campaign item
environment_variables.LOCATION: studio set, pop-up floor, showroom, workbench, or event setting
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary props, boxes, stickers, tags, labels, fabric, tools, or small scene details
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: large replacement headline or graphic type
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: short supporting tag, subtitle, or microcopy
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: sticker icon, warning mark, smiley, barcode, loop, star, or separator
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: wardrobe, styling, material, character treatment, or product surface direction
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: Pale cool-gray or off-white studio background with large empty breathing space around a dense central campaign cluster.
Glossy C4D character or product rendering with smooth plastic skin, simplified doll-like features, tactile fabric, chrome, and black rubber surfaces.
Low wide-angle camera perspective that makes foreground shoes, tools, bags, or props feel oversized and close to the viewer.
Heavy black condensed block headline typography acts as a massive graphic object, stacked and slightly compressed rather than quiet caption text.
Acid-lime green is the main accent, appearing as fabric fields, marker signatures, object trim, sticker dots, tags, and thin energetic strokes.
Small sticker-badge grammar surrounds the scene: warning triangles, smiley dots, barcode marks, capsule labels, scalloped seals, and tiny black tags.
Neon marker scribbles slash across or under the headline as deliberate graphic rhythm, not random background decoration.
Fashion editorial prop styling with shopping bags, stacked boxes, soft fabric rolls, brushes, cables, sunglasses, headphones, straps, and tactile accessories.
Commercial studio lighting is bright, clean, and synthetic, with soft shadows, glossy rim highlights, and no gritty analog texture.
Palette proportions stay disciplined: pale gray/white field, large black typography, acid lime as dominant accent, with tiny pink, yellow, cyan, and orange sticker sparks.
Composition balances a large left or upper type mass with a right or lower 3D subject cluster, leaving the type and character clearly legible.
Mood is youth-fashion, pop-up campaign, playful tech-beauty energy, and polished collectible-toy advertising.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate the original platform name, logo, watermark, handle, campaign slogan, carousel counter, or any exact text from the reference.
Do not copy the original white-haired seated young woman, sunglasses, headphones, makeup compact, lipstick, folding chair, exact crossed-leg pose, or facial identity.
Do not recreate the original beauty tutorial story, beauty-app premise, green crop top, gray flared pants, black platform shoes, tote bag, or exact prop layout.
Do not reuse the same stack of branded boxes, green fabric strip, warning triangle placement, barcode placement, flower charm, sticker seals, or handwritten signature mark.
Do not include real brand marks, social usernames, QR codes, platform UI, creator signatures, or app icons.
Avoid copying the same Chinese headline composition or the same phrase structure, even with altered wording.
Do not preserve the exact character anatomy, hairstyle, pose, seat height, or right-side chair silhouette from the source.
Do not turn the samples into flat vector posters, photoreal fashion photography, anime cel art, watercolor, grunge zines, or minimalist product shots.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: Glossy C4D youth-fashion poster, streetwear product campaign, acid-lime type-and-avatar social ad.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A large black headline mass occupies the left or upper area while a polished 3D subject cluster occupies the opposite side. Small stickers, tools, and props bridge the type and character zones.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: The subject sits, crouches, leans, kneels, or poses close to camera, with one oversized foreground object creating depth and scale.
visual_deconstruction.camera_angle_or_perspective: Low front three-quarter wide-angle perspective with mild lens exaggeration and cropped foreground props.
visual_deconstruction.typography_style: Huge black geometric block letters, condensed and tightly stacked, with short secondary type in black or acid-lime capsules; type behaves like a physical campaign wall.
visual_deconstruction.color_palette_behavior: A pale neutral base carries black type and acid-lime accents; small hot pink, yellow, orange, or cyan stickers add pop without overtaking the lime.
visual_deconstruction.graphic_elements: Marker strokes, signature-like scribbles, barcode strips, warning labels, tiny capsules, scalloped sticker seals, round smiley badges, hang tags, and thin black connector lines.
visual_deconstruction.texture_and_finish: Smooth plastic skin, matte-black rubber, glossy chrome, soft textile weave, semi-translucent acrylic, sticker paper, and crisp printed type.
visual_deconstruction.lighting: High-key studio lighting, soft floor shadows, gentle specular highlights, and clean advertising contrast.
visual_deconstruction.mood: Fashion-forward, playful, slightly cyber, youth pop-up, collectible, polished, and energetic.

primary_structure: Keep one enormous black block headline as a primary shape, preferably left-heavy for horizontal formats and upper-heavy for vertical formats.
Place the 3D subject cluster close to the viewer, offset from the type mass, with a low wide-angle perspective.
Use a pale studio floor and wall with soft shadows so the black type and lime accents remain crisp.
Add acid-lime fabric, product trim, marker strokes, or ground elements as a repeated accent field.
Scatter small sticker badges, warning marks, barcodes, tags, and seals around the main action in controlled clusters.
Use tactile props at the foreground edge, including tools, boxes, bags, cables, fabric, brushes, or fashion accessories.
Keep the main type readable and do not bury it behind too many props.
Maintain a campaign-poster balance between clean negative space and dense accessory detail.
composition.vertical_9x16: Use a stacked poster composition: black headline in the upper half, 3D subject in the center or lower-right, exaggerated foreground prop at the bottom, and lime ground accents crossing the lower third.
composition.horizontal_16x9: Use a split campaign layout: black headline mass across the left half, 3D subject and prop cluster on the right, with marker strokes and badges bridging the middle.

typography.headline: Oversized condensed black block display type, tightly stacked, squared, heavy, and slightly compressed, with a bold streetwear poster feel.
typography.secondary_text: Short supporting text in black-on-lime strips, white-on-black labels, or small rounded sans-serif tags.
typography.text_orientation: Main type is mostly horizontal and stacked; marker scribbles can cross it diagonally; micro labels may tilt or attach to props.
typography.text_behavior: Use only replacement text supplied by the case values. Keep it short, readable, and graphic; never include source slogans, platform names, watermarks, usernames, or real app marks.

color_palette.behavior: Use pale gray and off-white as the spatial field, black as the typographic anchor, acid lime as the primary pop color, and only tiny high-chroma stickers for secondary accents.

image_treatment.rendering_mode: Polished C4D 3D illustration blended with graphic poster typography and sticker design.
image_treatment.surface_quality: Smooth toy-like character surfaces, tactile textile weave, glossy black rubber, chrome rails or hardware, semi-translucent acrylic, and printed sticker paper.
image_treatment.lighting: High-key synthetic studio light with soft floor shadows, controlled highlights, gentle bloom, and crisp edge clarity.
image_treatment.depth: Short studio-stage depth with oversized foreground props, central subject, stacked boxes or bags behind, and flat headline wall space.
image_treatment.post_processing: Clean sharp high-resolution commercial finish, minimal grain, no rough analog distress, high contrast between black type and pale background.

design_rules: Preserve the acid-lime, black-type, pale-studio, glossy-C4D campaign family before changing subject matter.
Make the headline a massive black graphic block and keep it more important than small captions.
Use low wide-angle perspective so at least one foreground prop or body part feels exaggerated and close.
Repeat acid-lime accents through marker strokes, textile fields, tags, object trim, or sticker details.
Use sticker badges, barcodes, warning triangles, scalloped seals, and capsule labels as a controlled graphic grammar.
Keep the 3D subject toy-like, polished, and fashion-editorial rather than photoreal or anime.
Change every literal source detail: character, pose, exact prop, scene, brand identity, headline, and story premise.
Keep the background airy enough for the type to read while retaining dense prop detail around the subject.
do: Use glossy stylized 3D characters, mascots, tools, fashion props, or product objects on a pale studio set.
Use huge black block typography with acid-lime marker marks and short secondary labels.
Use low wide-angle foreground cropping, soft shadows, chrome, black rubber, textile weave, and tactile prop detail.
Use small sticker badges, warning labels, barcodes, and seals as repeatable poster accents.
Use acid lime as the dominant accent with tiny pink, yellow, cyan, or orange sparks.
avoid: Avoid platform logos, app marks, usernames, QR codes, watermarks, creator signatures, or real campaign lockups.
Avoid the source white-haired seated woman, sunglasses, headphones, compact, lipstick, folding chair, crossed-leg pose, and exact beauty premise.
Avoid source headline wording, source Chinese phrase structure, original handle, carousel counter, and source sticker placements.
Avoid flat vector art, anime cel shading, realistic fashion photography, grunge collage, watercolor, dark sci-fi, or minimal product photography.
Avoid overly busy text blocks that hide the large black headline or make the lime accents look random.
prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} finished raster image in the Acid Lime 3D Streetwear Type Poster Style. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Prop/Product: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Main text: {MAIN_TEXT}. Secondary text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}. Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Wardrobe/styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Style fidelity anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Source content to avoid: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Apply these style rules: pale cool-gray or off-white studio floor and wall, one huge mass of deep black condensed block headline typography, acid-lime marker scribbles and underlines crossing the type, glossy C4D toy-like 3D character or product rendering, low wide-angle front three-quarter perspective, oversized foreground prop or footwear-scale object near the lens, tactile fashion props, stacked boxes or bags, chrome and black rubber surfaces, soft textile weave, semi-translucent acrylic details, controlled sticker-badge clusters, warning triangles, barcode strips, smiley dots, scalloped seals, tiny black tags, small hot pink and yellow accents, clean high-key commercial studio lighting, soft shadows, crisp specular highlights, polished high-resolution poster finish. For 9:16, stack the black headline above or beside the central subject and crop a foreground prop along the lower edge. For 16:9, place the headline as a left-heavy type block and stage the 3D subject cluster on the right with lime accents bridging the center. Important content rule: match the visual style first, then change the source content completely with a new subject, new action, new prop, new location, new headline, new microcopy, and no copied brand identity.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, QR code, app logo, platform logo, real brand mark, creator signature, source platform name, source handle, source Chinese headline, source carousel counter, white-haired seated woman, sunglasses and headphones combination from the source, makeup compact, lipstick, folding chair, crossed-leg pose, green crop top, gray flared pants, black platform shoes copied from source, original beauty-app premise, copied sticker placements, exact barcode layout, exact warning triangle placement, flat vector art, anime cel shading, photorealistic fashion photography, grunge zine collage, watercolor, dark sci-fi, muted palette, minimalist product shot, unreadable typography, long text blocks, low-resolution render
